title: AGP Wave 4A — Signal Lake + Growth Score
executive_summary: Wave 4A delivers the Autonomous Marketing Brain foundation: a daily signal lake, a 0-100 Growth Score (overall + 13 subscores), and per-product health tiers across 428 active products. Live run produced overall 26.2 with 348 Tier-A and 80 Tier-B products. Subscores correctly surfaced the Pinterest analytics gap (0) and revenue tracking gap (0), validating the engine while exposing where upstream syncs need attention before Wave 4B.
database_changes: agp_signals_daily (24 KPI columns, day-unique, RLS admin-only)

high: Investigate Pinterest analytics sync (pin_impressions=0 for the target day)
Backfill agp_product_health.revenue_30d_cents and ctr via existing analytics tables
medium: Add cron schedules: signal-collector 02:00 UTC, growth-scorer 02:30 UTC
low: Expose sparkline charts (currently numeric subscores only)
